server next_valid_id {"order_id":1}
server api_error {"req_id":-1,"code":2104,"message":"Market data farm connection is OK:usfarm","advanced_order_reject_json":"","error_time_ms":"1775425823939"}

server api_error {"req_id":-1,"code":2158,"message":"Sec-def data farm connection is OK:secdefnj","advanced_order_reject_json":"","error_time_ms":"1775425823939"}
client req_account_summary {"req_id":"$req1","account":"All","tags":["NetLiquidation","TotalCashValue","BuyingPower","ExcessLiquidity"]}
server account_summary {"req_id":"$req1","account":"U10597365","tag":"BuyingPower","value":"266701.40","currency":"EUR"}
